programme.title: NFL Game of the Week
programme.desc: The 42-year-old Pittsburgh Steelers quarterback Aaron Rodgers threw for a season-high 294 yards, the last 26 come on a go-ahead scoring pass to Calvin Austin III with 55 seconds left; the Steelers claim their first AFC North title in five years.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Cowboys rally from 11 down to stop Giants. Tony Romo upstaged Odell Beckham Jr.'s jaw-dropping one-handed touchdown catch during Week 12 of the 2013 season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Sam Darnold guides a 16-point comeback against the Rams to force OT. Jaxson Smith-Njigba's touchdown and tight end Eric Saubert's two-point conversion complete the Seattle Seahawks comeback with a 38-37 win over the Los Angeles Rams in overtime.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Cardinals' thrilling overtime 37-34 win over the Seahawks in 2020. Arizona quarterback Kyler Murray, wide receiver DeAndre Hopkins and company outscore Seattle in an aerial shootout in the desert.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Buffalo Bills' defense bent but didn't break in an outing initially dominated by Derrick Henry, who finished with 169 yards rushing and scored twice.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jets overcame a 14-point deficit in the fourth quarter, with help from Plaxico Burress' receiving touchdown and Joe McKnight's blocked punt to help tie the game with five minutes to go.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Derek Carr's touchdown pass caps Las Vegas Raiders rally past Baltimore Ravens 33-27 in OT. The party could finally begin for real after the first game with fans in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Philip Rivers-led San Diego Chargers take on the Carson Palmer-led Arizona Cardinals in Week 1 of the 2014 season on the Monday Night Football opener.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Philip Rivers-led San Diego Chargers take on the Carson Palmer-led Arizona Cardinals in Week 1 of the 2014 season on the Monday Night Football opener.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chiefs rookie Xavier Worthy shined with two touchdowns and Patrick Mahomes made history, becoming the Chiefs' all-time passing yards leader in a thrilling win over the Ravens.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal show which setup, swing, and equipment adjustments translate into stopping slices and hooks. Martin shares some of his favorite drills on finding the proper grip, maintaining balance, and swinging on the proper plane.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the best wedge tips for around the green. Learn how to set up for success, use tees to improve contact, and how to control distance like Dustin Johnson with the use of a clock.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in The Masters; Martin shares a driving tip he learned playing golf with Dustin Johnson and a distance drill used by Jack Nicklaus; a top college player gives a guest lesson.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall explains how to become a better putter ASAP; those four letters standing for aim, stability, arc, and pace. Martin shares drills for each letter from putting gurus including Dave Stockton, Phil Kenyon, and the late Frank Thomas.
